# setLocalTransform(_:forTime:)

**Instance Method**

Sets a new local transform matrix for the specified time sample.

## Declaration

```swift
optional func setLocalTransform(_ transform: matrix_float4x4, forTime time: TimeInterval)
```

## Parameters

- **transform**: The local transformation matrix for the specified time sample.
- **time**: The time sample with which to associate transform information.

## Discussion

Calling this method updates the [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLTransformComponent/minimumTime] and [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLTransformComponent/maximumTime] properties to reflect the range of sample values stored in the transform component.

## Working with Animated Transforms

- **minimumTime**: The timestamp for the first timed data sample in the transform component.
- **maximumTime**: The timestamp for the last timed data sample in the transform component.
- **localTransform(atTime:)**: Returns the local transform matrix as of the specified time sample.
